translations.en: a small man in a handsome vest made of seashells.
translations.zh: 一位身材矮小、穿著貝殼製成的華美背心之男子。

translations.en: "It's fighting time. Talking's for later."
translations.zh: 「現在是打架時間。說話的事待會兒再說。」

translations.en: "Why, hullo there, $G. And who might ye be?"
"Well met, $G $Z. Let me tell ye a @tale."
"Oho, that be a name in need of a story."
translations.zh: 「哦，那名字倒是需要一個故事來配。」

translations.en: "Why, hullo there, $P. Have I told ye the one about the gypsies?"
translations.zh: 「哦，你好，$P。吾跟汝說過那個吉普賽人的故事嗎？」

translations.en: "Oh. Perhaps a @song, then."
"Now there's a @tale."
"Culham's me name, $G."
"When @spirits be low, I play tunes to bring @cheer."
translations.zh: 「當眾人@意氣消沉，吾便奏起樂曲帶來@歡愉。」

translations.en: "Once I heard a haunting melody..."
translations.zh: 「吾曾聽見一段縈繞不去的旋律……」

translations.en: "...in Old @Magincia." He laughs.
"Well, it used to be a ghost town."
He laughs and plays a little tune on his lute.
translations.zh: 他大笑，並在魯特琴上撥弄了一段小曲。

translations.en: "The Mantra of Valour bringeth great cheer."
"I'm not a great singer, but I love to play a song of valour."
translations.zh: 「吾算不上什麼了不起的歌手，但吾愛演奏勇氣之歌。」

translations.en: "It makes me @sing."
"I'll sing, though I'd rather @play."
The pub is filled with the sound of singing.
Culham sings for you.
"It seemed like such an easy climb
I crawled upon the Serpent's Spine
translations.note: song verse 1 line 2; Serpent's Spine = mountain range

translations.en: I hadn't even time to blanch
translations.zh: 連臉色發白的時間都沒有

translations.en: When down there came an avalanche!"
"And then my mantra came to mind
'Tho boulders bounced and passed with speed.
My frozen fingers gripped to rock
translations.zh: 吾凍僵的手指緊抓岩石

translations.en: As sliding snow swept loose my feet."
"Sing 'ra,' my friends, sing 'ra.'
'Tis a song to make thee strong
When the mountains be high
And the ground be far..."
"...Sing 'ra,' my friends, sing 'ra!'"
translations.note: song chorus repeat; mantra 'ra' kept as-is

translations.en: "Ah, yes. That's quite a story, too."
translations.zh: 「啊，是的。那也是個精彩的故事。」

translations.en: "Naughty Nomaan dropped the Rune of Valor, and the rat carried it off."
translations.zh: 「頑劣諾曼把勇氣符文掉了，老鼠把它叼走了。」

translations.en: He laughs loudly.
Too loudly. Stelnar and Jerris begin to argue over whether it was a rat or a mouse.
translations.zh: 笑得太大聲了。史塔赫姆與傑里斯開始爭論那是老鼠還是鼷鼠。

translations.en: Once again a brawl breaks out!
"May we meet again soon, friend."
"Sorry, I cannot help ye with that."
"Would ye really like to hear a story?"
"Well, not everyone likes gypsy tales, I suppose."
translations.zh: 「嗯，不是每個人都喜歡吉普賽故事，吾想。」

translations.en: "I call this story..."
"Arturosis"
"Two gypsies come to Trinsic, hungry as usual."
translations.zh: 「兩個吉普賽人來到崔西克，一如往常地飢腸轆轆。」

translations.en: "One goes out and gathers a poisonous weed from the swamps."
translations.zh: 「一人出去，從沼澤中採集了有毒的野草。」

translations.en: "The other sneaks into town and puts the plant into the trough of a horse."
translations.zh: 「另一人偷偷溜進城，把那草放入一匹馬的水槽裡。」

translations.en: "Well, poor horse doesn't know better."
"He eats the stuff, swells up and takes ill."
translations.zh: 「牠吃了那東西，腫了起來，病倒了。」

translations.en: "The owner, Immanuelle, doesn't know what to do."
translations.zh: 「馬的主人伊曼紐爾不知所措。」

translations.en: "Along come the gypsies. 'Aiee!' they cry."
translations.zh: 「吉普賽人隨即趕來。他們大呼：『哎呀！』」

translations.en: "'Yonder nag hath contracted 'Arturosis.'"
translations.zh: 「『那匹駑馬染上了「阿圖羅病症」。』」

translations.en: "Unless it be immediately removed, the rest shall catch the same fatal disease.'"
translations.zh: 「『若不立即移除，其餘牲口皆將染上此致命之疾。』」

translations.en: "Immanuelle decides to sacrifice the diseased one and the gypsies agree heartily."
translations.zh: 「伊曼紐爾決定犧牲那匹病馬，吉普賽人欣然同意。」

translations.en: "'For but a few coins,' say the gypsies,' we will lead it away and bury it far from here.'"
translations.zh: 「『只需幾枚銅幣，』吉普賽人說，『吾等將牠帶走，葬於遠處。』」

translations.en: "Immanuelle is too happy to hand them the doomed animal's bridle, plus ten coins."
translations.zh: 「伊曼紐爾高高興興地把那倒楣牲口的韁繩交給他們，再加上十枚銅幣。」

translations.en: "So the gypsies make a great kettle of horse stew and bury the rest."
translations.zh: 「於是吉普賽人燉了一大鍋馬肉湯，把剩下的埋了。」

translations.en: "A great feast is held 'mongst gypsykind."
"Meanwhile, Immanuelle thanks virtue that the equine epidemic was caught early on!"
translations.zh: 「與此同時，伊曼紐爾感謝美德的庇護，馬瘟發現得如此之早！」

translations.en: "'Tis a true story, my friend."

translator_notes: 卡翰是個說故事兼演奏的遊吟詩人，語氣快活詼諧。歌詞保留意象，真言「ra」以原文呈現（遊戲機制字）。吉普賽故事幽默地揭示吉普賽人的詭計，伊曼紐爾受騙。Serpent's Spine 為山脈名。
